faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth problem in my Port Chester home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small holes in wool, silk, or cashmere items, webbing in closet corners, small beige larvae on clothing or carpets, and adult moths flying near wardrobes. You may also notice damage to upholstered furniture or area rugs. Our Port Chester technicians provide free inspections to accurately identify the extent of your clothes moth problem.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth control service cost in Port Chester?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in Port Chester typically ranges from $550 for a single-room treatment to $5,000 for whole-home infestations requiring extensive treatment. Pricing depends on the size of your home, severity of infestation, number of affected areas, and whether follow-up treatments are needed. We provide free estimates and customized treatment plans for all Port Chester properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat a clothes moth infestation in Port Chester?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for Port Chester residents experiencing clothes moth problems. Most treatments can be completed in 2-4 hours depending on the size of your home and extent of the infestation. Our technicians will advise you on preparation steps and post-treatment protocols to ensure maximum effectiveness and prevent re-infestation.

faqs.question: Are your clothes moth treatments safe for my family and pets in Port Chester?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and integrated pest management techniques that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals.
